mapper.insert:
insert into sys_post_department(post_id, department_id, tenant_id) values
(#{item.postId},#{item.departmentId},#{item.tenantId})
mapper.select: select department_id from sys_post_department where post_id=#{postId}
mapper.update: update sys_post_department pd inner join sys_post p on p.post_id = pd.post_id set pd.tenant_id = p.tenant_id where pd.post_id = #{postId} and (pd.tenant_id is null or pd.tenant_id = '') and p.tenant_id is not null and trim(p.tenant_id) != ''

update sys_post_department pd inner join fd_department d on d.id = pd.department_id set pd.tenant_id = d.tenant_id where pd.post_id = #{postId} and (pd.tenant_id is null or pd.tenant_id = '') and d.tenant_id is not null and trim(d.tenant_id) != ''

update sys_post_department pd inner join sys_post p on p.post_id = pd.post_id set pd.tenant_id = p.tenant_id where (pd.tenant_id is null or pd.tenant_id = '') and p.tenant_id is not null and trim(p.tenant_id) != ''

update sys_post_department pd inner join fd_department d on d.id = pd.department_id set pd.tenant_id = d.tenant_id where (pd.tenant_id is null or pd.tenant_id = '') and d.tenant_id is not null and trim(d.tenant_id) != ''
